entry.title: BILL016(26) (Honolulu): CCL → ILA
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE REGULATION OF DOGS.

Requires the CSD Director or the head of the City agency designated by the Mayor to require the animal control contractor to enforce the provisions contained in ROH Chapter 12, Article 4. Increases existing criminal fines and establishes new civil fines.

Status: CCL → ILA

Latest action: Cancelled and not considered.

View on the council site
